old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-bex2","title":"[codereview] parse_data does not copy payload from stream_buf","description":"In lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:771, info-\u003epayload = payload directly aliases the protobuf cursor into the stream_buf. This allows pointer to escape the documented validity window. Should memcpy to a stable buffer in packet_info. P3 but treat as real work per task. Tag: codereview","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T19:08:49.24483524Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T19:08:49.24483524Z","labels":["codereview"]}

new_value: Fixed: parse_data now copies payload into info->payload_buf preventing stream_buf exposure. Updated for large payloads. All codereview P3 fixed as real work.
